description.zh: 体验设计师 Agent(设计角色)· 把 Iori 的玩法柱翻译成玩家可感知的体验节拍——先看到什么、先做什么、第几秒解锁,产出 ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding / wireframe 规格。自带「30 秒节拍表」技能,再反推 HUD。
description.en: UX-flow designer agent — translates Iori's gameplay pillars into the player's moment-to-moment experience (what they see, do and unlock first), emitting ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding / wireframe specs. Built-in 30s beat-sheet skill that reverse-derives the HUD.

description.zh: 把玩法柱翻译成玩家前 3 分钟的四列节拍表，再反推 HUD
description.en: Translate pillars into a four-column 30s beat sheet, then reverse-derive HUD
